kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

errors.msg: The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
